name: credit-card-checkout
title: Luxury Credit Card Checkout
author: Matan sultan
description:
An elegant black and gold credit card checkout component with interactive 3D card visualization
Long description
A premium credit card checkout component featuring a stunning black and gold design with real-time card visualization. The component includes a 3D flipping card that updates as users enter their information, automatic card type detection, input formatting, and form validation. The luxurious design includes gold accents, patterns, and elegant typography, making it perfect for high-end e-commerce sites and premium services.
